codegraph_context.notes: Returns plain text (str) — markdown-formatted code intelligence report. No TypedDict warranted.

codegraph_explore.notes: Returns plain text (str) — verbatim source grouped by file. No TypedDict warranted.

codegraph_node.notes: Returns plain text (str) — symbol location, signature, callers/callees. No TypedDict warranted.

codegraph_search.notes: Returns plain text (str) — symbol name/location listing. No TypedDict warranted.

codegraph_trace.notes: Returns plain text (str) — call-path chain with hop bodies. No TypedDict warranted.
